speaker: speaker1
text: Hey , look over there . It seems that there is something interesting going on . Let's go and have a look .

speaker: speaker2
text: Sure . It's probably a skiing show . Adam told me there are many skiing clubs whose members put on shows to attract more visitors .

speaker: speaker1
text: Look at that . It's so dangerous . My mom would never allow me to do that .

speaker: speaker2
text: Stop all this fuss and enjoy the show .

speaker: speaker1
text: You are right . But what if an avalanche happened ?

speaker: speaker2
text: They are all great skiers and very experienced . So I suppose the chance for them to be buried by an avalanche is slim .

speaker: speaker1
text: Anyway , the show is breathtaking . By the way , where did they get so much snow here ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , they have the most advanced snowmaking machine .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you think the snowmaking may cause pollution ?
